description: Phase 3 — Universal 20-domain taxonomy. Every standard maps to one or more domains via the `taxonomy` array in standards.json. These domains are the spine of the knowledge graph and the navigation model for the Nirva Universal Compliance Engine.

domains.name: Governance
domains.th: การกำกับดูแล
domains.definition: Direction-setting, accountability, policy, leadership, organizational structure.

domains.name: Risk
domains.th: ความเสี่ยง
domains.definition: Identification, assessment, treatment and monitoring of uncertainty.

domains.name: Compliance
domains.th: การปฏิบัติตามข้อกำหนด
domains.definition: Meeting legal, regulatory, contractual and voluntary obligations.

domains.name: People
domains.th: บุคลากร
domains.definition: Competence, training, awareness, roles, human capital, culture.

domains.name: Finance
domains.th: การเงิน
domains.definition: Financial reporting, internal control over financial reporting, accounting.

domains.name: Operation
domains.th: การปฏิบัติการ
domains.definition: Process management, service delivery, production, change & incident mgmt.

domains.name: Asset
domains.th: สินทรัพย์
domains.definition: Lifecycle management of physical, information and intangible assets.

domains.name: Customer
domains.th: ลูกค้า
domains.definition: Customer focus, satisfaction, accessibility, service experience.

domains.name: Supplier
domains.th: ผู้จัดหา
domains.definition: Third-party/supply-chain risk, procurement, vendor management.

domains.name: Environment
domains.th: สิ่งแวดล้อม
domains.definition: Environmental aspects, emissions, energy, pollution, resources.

domains.name: Safety
domains.th: ความปลอดภัย (อาชีวอนามัย)
domains.definition: Occupational health, physical & product safety, hazard control.

domains.name: Security
domains.th: ความมั่นคงปลอดภัยสารสนเทศ
domains.definition: Information / cyber / physical security controls.

domains.name: Privacy
domains.th: ความเป็นส่วนตัว
domains.definition: Personal data protection, data subject rights, privacy by design.

domains.name: AI
domains.th: ปัญญาประดิษฐ์
domains.definition: Responsible / trustworthy AI governance, ML risk, model lifecycle.

domains.name: Knowledge
domains.th: ความรู้
domains.definition: Knowledge management, documented information, records, competence retention.

domains.name: Improvement
domains.th: การปรับปรุง
domains.definition: Continual improvement, corrective action, nonconformity, PDCA.

domains.name: Sustainability
domains.th: ความยั่งยืน / ESG
domains.definition: ESG, social responsibility, sustainability reporting, net-zero.

domains.name: Audit
domains.th: การตรวจสอบ
domains.definition: Internal/external audit, assurance, attestation, management review.

domains.name: BusinessContinuity
domains.th: ความต่อเนื่องทางธุรกิจ
domains.definition: Resilience, BIA, continuity, disaster recovery, crisis management.

domains.name: Legal
domains.th: กฎหมาย
domains.definition: Legal obligations, contracts, IP, regulatory law, liability.

mapping_note: A standard's presence in multiple domains is the primary edge type 'COVERS' in the graph: (Standard)-[:COVERS]->(Domain). The 'One Data, One Evidence, Many Standards' principle is realized because controls (controls.json) attach to domains and requirements, not to a single standard.
